description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes, and protects it during transmission, movement, or removal.

subcriteria.name: encryption_in_transit
subcriteria.reference_text: TLS 1.2 or higher enforced for all data in transit. SSL Labs scan showing A or A+ rating. HTTPS enforced on all public endpoints. HSTS headers configured. Weak cipher suites disabled. Certificate management with auto-renewal.

subcriteria.name: secure_transfer
subcriteria.reference_text: SFTP or encrypted channels used for transferring sensitive data. API endpoints protected with TLS and authentication tokens. Internal service-to-service communication encrypted. Data loss prevention rules restricting unauthorized transfers.

subcriteria.name: endpoint_protection
subcriteria.reference_text: Mobile device management policy for laptops, phones, and tablets. Removable media encrypted or prohibited. Full disk encryption enabled on all company-issued devices. USB restrictions configured.

mismatch_signals.reason: Encryption at rest is CC6.1, not data in transit protection.
Incident response is CC7.4, not data transmission protection.
